title: pelexia triangularis
intro: Pelexia triangularis, also known as the "Yellow Bird's Nest Orchid," is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a terrestrial orchid with triangular pseudobulbs that produce yellow flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Pelexia triangularis has been traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, and is often prepared as a decoction or infusion.
